name: dockerized-agent
description: Parameterized Docker-backed delegated agent TaskSpec that reads a caller-supplied document and explains it in one sentence.

provider.help: Delegated provider CLI to run inside Docker

prompt.help: Instruction to apply to the supplied document

document.help: Host path to a document file to mount read-only into the container

explain_mounted.instructions: Read the mounted document path provided in the prompt and reply with one sentence explaining what Weft is.

explain_inline.instructions: Read the provided document text and reply with exactly one sentence explaining what Weft is. Output exactly one sentence and nothing else.
